title: British Columbia Programme Monthly Trend Sheet - November 2025
content:
• Year-to-date credit volumes for 2025 increased by about 27.60%, and are currently at 1,415,256 compared to 1,109,140 in 2024. Credit Volumes in November 2025 saw a significant increase of 73.81% as compared to October 2025, with volumes rising from 80,547 in October 2025 to 140,000 in November 2025. This month witnessed the highest average ticket size of 46,666.67 volume per transfer, based on 3 transfers.
  • In November 2025, credit prices in BC LCFS rose by 3.80% month-on-month (MoM), rising from $229.80 in October to $238.54 in November.
  • Year-to-year credit prices fell by 8.01%, dropping from $259.30 in November 2024 to $238.54 in November 2025.
  • The monthâ€™s minâ€“max range was the tightest YTD at $1.50, with credits trading between $238.00 and $239.50.
author: Radhika Khandelwal
